case_title: ATSUO JINZENJI VS. PETER LORENZO LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JINZENJI, ATSUO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, PETER LORENZO $906.44 PRINCIPAL, $78.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $984.94, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $150.00 EACH MONTH STARTING APRIL 15, 2009 AND CONTINUING THROUGH SEPTEMBER 15, 2009, WITH THE SEPTEMBER PAYMENT CLEARING THE BALANCE TO ZERO. NEW ERA BASEBALL HAT TO BE RETURNED BY APRIL 15, 2009. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT & ANSWER(SMALL CLAIMS) FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF JINZENJI, ATSUO AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, PETER LORENZO
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER SMALL CLAIMS (SC-105A) GRANTED. -PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE-
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JINZENJI, ATSUO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, PETER LORENZO $906.44 PRINCIPAL, $78.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $984.94, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF:$150.00 EACH MOUNTH STARTING APRIL 15,2009 AND CONTINUING THROUGH SEPTEMBER 15,2009, WITH THE SEPTEMBER PAYMENT CLEARING THE BALANCE TO ZERO. NEW ERA BASEBALL HAT TO BE RETURNED BY APRIL 15,2009. $90.00 TO BE ADDED TO LAST PAYMENT DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF PER MARCH 16,2009 ORDER & JUDGMENT FOR VALUE OF HAT NOT RETURNED BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
